summary: No concrete details on recording quality and the show; reviewers only mention a great opening act and personal nostalgia.
review: The lone review offers no information about the audio source or mix, merely praising the opening act (Kesey) and lamenting missing a different concert. With a middling three‑star rating and no specific performance comments, the overall impression is neutral.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review with no technical or musical details; star rating of 3 suggests an average perception but insufficient data for a higher confidence rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review does not mention sound quality, clarity, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or song performance.
